creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi, 
i have issue in shell fish with this characters
fish version 3.0.2

maxfx@ ~> sudo portmaster c{- (line 1): Unexpected end of string, incomplete parameter expansion
begin; set all /usr/ports/c{*/ 
 ;end <&3 3<&-
               ^
